title: Why AI Agents Guess—and How to Verify the Facts
titleCandidates: Why AI Agents Guess—and How to Verify the Facts
Stop AI Agent Hallucinations With a Fact-Check Method
AI Agent Uncertainty: Know When to Verify or Abstain
thumbnailText: AI AGENTS GUESS. VERIFY THE FACTS.
description:
AI Agents can sound certain while guessing. This video shows you how to recognize answerability, make uncertainty useful, and verify high-risk facts before an AI Agent acts on them.

What you'll learn:
- Why common training and evaluation incentives reward confident guessing
- When an AI Agent should answer, verify, ask, or abstain
- How to use a six-step fact-check checklist for decisions that matter

Chapters:
00:00 Introduction
00:49 Guessing Incentives
02:10 Answerability
03:26 Express Uncertainty
04:40 Verify High-Risk Facts
05:56 Fact-Check Checklist
07:11 Summary

Follow Tiny Agent. Tiny Agent helps you get better at using AI.
